title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:Mac:kernel-workspace:39719:run:20260404T200602:65205 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap...
summary_text: **Findings (high → low)** 1. `P0`: ナイーブに「LLMがWiki本文を直接持ち回る」実装をすると、Kernelの `compact`/`phase_artifacts` 契約を即破ります。`phase_artifacts` は path-only、本文混入禁止、compactは bounded という前提です（[requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md#L106](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md#L106), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md#L143](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md#L143), [schema-v1.md#L125](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md#L125)）。失敗モードは gate fail と handoff 破綻です（[kernel-phase-gate.sh#L207](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh#L207)）。 2. `P0`: 「単一LLMの自律KB運用」は three-voice / 6-lane の健全性証跡と衝突し、run が `invalid` 判定になります。healthは lane数・active models・agent/subagent labels・provider success を必須化しています（[execution-lanes.md#L6](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/execution-lanes.md#L6), [kernel-runtime-health.sh#L178](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L178), [kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L54](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L54)）。失敗モードは `codex/glm/specialist evidence missing` で fail-closed です。 3. `P0`: KB ingest/query を実行トリガに直結すると、FUGUEの start-signal と safety gate をバイパスしやすいです。現行は `/vote` 等の明示開始が必要で、実装前に preflight ループを強制しています（[workflow-ownership.md#L12](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/workflow-ownership.md#L12), [safety-governance.md#L13](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/safety-governance.md#L13)）。失敗モードは「レビュー系タスクが暗黙実装へ昇格」です。 4. `P1`: 「Wikiを新しい運用真実源」にすると、既存の run truth（bootstrap receipt / runtime ledger / compact / workspace receipt）と split-brain になります。現行は run 1:1:1 契約と recovery 導線前提です（[schema-v1.md#L151](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md#L151), [kernel-runtime-ledger.sh#L119](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh#L119), [test-kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L104](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L104)）。失敗モードは doctor/recover の誤復旧です。 5. `P1`: Karpathy型の継続lint/QA/再生成ループは specialist 予算をすぐ枯らします。`cursor/copilot` は run単位 cap 1 です（[kernel-optional-lane-budget.sh#L11](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-budget.sh#L11), [kernel-optional-lane-budget.sh#L123](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-budget.sh#L123), [kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh#L171](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh#L171)）。失敗モードは specialist不在→degraded/blocked です。 6. `P1`: 大規模Wikiをコンテキストに直接積む方式は、Kernelの context governor と逆方向です。Kernelは「全文持ち回り」ではなく packet/retrieval を要求しています（[kernel-context-governor.md#L22](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-context-governor.md#L22), [kernel-context-governor.md#L80](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-context-governor.md#L80), [kernel-context-governor.md#L109](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-context-governor.md#L109)）。失敗モードは summary drift と品質劣化です。 7. `P2`: 既存 `memory-query` は compact JSON だけを対象にした軽量検索で、Karpathy型のフルKB検索基盤ではありません（[kernel-memory-query.sh#L16](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-memory-query.sh#L16), [kernel-memory-query.sh#L113](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-memory-query.sh#L113)）。これをそのまま拡張すると、検索精度・遅延・契約境界が崩れやすいです。
